docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY PASSENEAU, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GISELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS AS TO DEFTY GISELLE GARCIA, NO MAILING DONE ON SUB SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASSENEAU, KIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, GISELLE $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45.00, DEFT TO EITHER RETURN THE DOG TO PLFT OR PAY PLFT $150 FOR THE DOG. IF DEFT INTENDS TO RETURN THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT TO EITHER RETURN THE DOG TO PLFT OR PAY PLFT $150 FOR THE DOG. IF DEFT INTENDS TO RETURN THE DOG TO PLFT,DEFT TO DO SO BY 8/2/96. IF DEFT DOES
NOT RETURN THE DOG BY 8/2/96, PLFT IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT FOR $150.
